result.stdout:
Description:
  AIM: Git Intelligence Message - Automatically generate commit messages using AI

Usage:
  Aim [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  config  Manage configuration settings
  commit  Git commit with AI generated messages

result.stdout:
Description:
  Git commit with AI generated messages

Usage:
  Aim commit [options]

Options:
  -a, --all       Run git add . then commit all with AI generated messages
  --amend         Generate message for amending the last commit
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage configuration settings

Usage:
  Aim config [options]

Options:
  --show          Show current configuration
  --set <set>     Set a configuration value (format: key=value)
  --reset         Reset to default configuration
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
